name: Cloudweb, Inc.
business: Cloudweb, Inc. provides web hosting and data storage services through its platforms Hostwizer.com, W8hosting.com, and JeyCloud.com. The company is exploring offering free hosting supported by advertising and white labeling its services to other brands.

exposures.sentence: We are currently exploring different options of further developing and marketing our web hosting and data storage services Hostwizer.com, W8hosting.com, and JeyCloud.com.
